info.title: CPMigrate
info.description: The ultimate CLI tool for modernizing .NET solutions to NuGet Central Package Management (CPM). Automates migration, resolves dependency hell, eliminates redundancy, and secures your supply chain with vulnerability audits.

options.name: --solution
options.description:
Path to a .sln/.slnx file, or a directory
containing one. When omitted, CPMigrate uses the
current directory.

options.name: --project
options.description:
Path to a specific project file, or a directory
containing one project (.csproj, .fsproj, .vbproj).

options.name: --output-dir
options.description: (Default: .) The props file output directory.

options.name: --keep-attrs
options.description:
(Default: false) Keeps the 'Version' attribute in
the project files.

options.name: --no-backup
options.description:
(Default: false) Disables the default backup
option.

options.name: --backup-dir
options.description:
(Default: .) The backup directory for project files
about to be changed.

options.name: --add-gitignore
options.description:
(Default: false) Adds the backup directory to
.gitignore file. Creates one if not present.

options.name: --gitignore-dir
options.description:
(Default: .) The directory for .gitignore file if
there isn't one existing.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description:
(Default: false) Preview changes without modifying
any files.

options.name: --merge
options.description:
(Default: false) Merge into existing
Directory.Packages.props instead of failing if it
already exists.

options.name: --conflict-strategy
options.description:
(Default: Highest) How to handle version conflicts:
Highest (default), Lowest, or Fail.

options.name: --rollback
options.description:
(Default: false) Restore project files from most
recent backup and remove Directory.Packages.props.

options.name: --analyze
options.description:
(Default: false) Analyze packages for issues
(version inconsistencies, duplicates, redundant
references) without modifying files.

options.name: --transitive
options.description:
(Default: false) Include transitive dependencies in
analysis and migration suggestions (requires
'dotnet restore').

options.name: --audit
options.description:
(Default: false) Perform security audit for known
vulnerabilities (requires 'dotnet restore').

options.name: --outdated
options.description:
(Default: false) Include outdated package checks
(requires --analyze).

options.name: --deprecated
options.description: (Default: false) Include deprecated package checks

options.name: --interactive
options.description:
(Default: false) Run in interactive wizard mode
with guided prompts.

options.name: --output
options.description:
(Default: Terminal) Output format: Terminal
(default) or Json for CI/CD integration.

options.name: --output-file
options.description:
Write output to file instead of stdout (only
applies to JSON output).

options.name: --quiet
options.description:
(Default: false) Suppress non-essential output
(progress bars, spinners). Useful for scripts.

options.name: --verbose
options.description:
(Default: false) Enable verbose diagnostic logging
to a file (cpmigrate.log in current directory).

options.name: --batch
options.description:
Scan directory recursively for .sln files and
process each.

options.name: --batch-parallel
options.description:
(Default: false) Process solutions in parallel
(default: sequential).

options.name: --batch-continue
options.description:
(Default: false) Continue processing even if one
solution fails.

options.name: --prune-backups
options.description:
(Default: false) Delete old backups, keeping only
the most recent based on --retention.

options.name: --prune-all
options.description:
(Default: false) Delete ALL backups (requires
confirmation unless --quiet is set).

options.name: --retention
options.description:
(Default: 5) Number of backups to keep when pruning
(default: 5, 0 = keep all).

options.name: --list-backups
options.description:
(Default: false) List all available backups with
timestamps and file counts.

options.name: --interactive-conflicts
options.description:
(Default: false) Prompt for each version conflict
instead of auto-resolving.

options.name: --unify-props
options.description:
(Default: false) Migrate common properties from
projects to Directory.Build.props.

options.name: --force
options.description:
(Default: false) Force operations without
confirmation prompts.

options.name: --fix
options.description:
(Default: false) Apply automatic fixes for detected
issues (use with --analyze).

options.name: --fix-dry-run
options.description:
(Default: false) Show what --fix would change
without modifying files.

options.name: --update
options.description:
(Default: false) Check for and install the latest
version of CPMigrate.

options.name: --update-packages
options.description:
(Default: false) Update all packages to latest
versions, run tests, rollback on failure.

options.name: --include-prerelease
options.description:
(Default: false) Include pre-release versions when
updating packages.

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.
